About Me

My Story

Undergraduate Student — 100 Level

Started with nothing but a dream, a screen, and the courage to go live. Every stream is part of the journey — the grind, the growth, the wins, and the unforgettable moments. Building a community, creating entertainment, and proving that consistency turns small beginnings into something legendary.

Alongside content creation, I'm pursuing a career in Petroleum and Gas Engineering — passionate about energy development and innovation. Proving you can build two worlds at once and win in both.
